Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class ScaleDepositionAccumulator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.ScaleDepositionAccumulator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ScaleDepositionAccumulator extends Object implements Serializable
Integrates scale-deposition risk along a PipeBeggsAndBrills segmented pipeline by evaluating an ScalePredictionCalculator at each segment temperature and pressure, then estimating cumulative deposit thickness on the wall and time-to-blockage.

This is a screening-level model (NACE TM0374, NORSOK M-001 informational) intended for relative ranking of pipeline segments rather than absolute mass-balance prediction.

The deposition driving force per segment is taken as max(0, exp(SI*ln10) - 1) * baseRate_kg_m2_yr, where SI is the CaCO3 saturation index (other phases optionally added by client) and baseRate_kg_m2_yr defaults to a field-typical 0.5 kg/(m^2.yr). This keeps the model tunable without requiring kinetic data the user usually does not have at screening stage.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Description
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe)
    Constructs the accumulator bound to a Beggs-and-Brills pipeline.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    evaluate()
    Walks each Beggs-and-Brills segment, evaluates the CaCO3 saturation index, and integrates deposit mass and wall thickness.
    double
    getMaxThicknessMm()
    Returns the maximum segment thickness [mm].
    List<Double>
    getSegmentDepositionMassKg()
    Returns the per-segment cumulative deposition mass [kg].
    List<Double>
    getSegmentSaturationIndex()
    Returns the per-segment CaCO3 saturation index list.
    List<Double>
    getSegmentThicknessMm()
    Returns the per-segment scale thickness [mm].
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    getStandardsApplied()
    Returns the standards used by this accumulator.
    double
    getTimeToBlockageYears()
    Returns the projected time until the worst segment occludes half the pipe cross-section [years].
    double
    getTotalDepositionMassKg()
    Returns the integrated total deposition mass over all segments [kg].
    boolean
    isEvaluated()
    Returns true once evaluate() has been invoked.
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setBaseRate(double rate)
    Sets the base deposition rate at SI = 1.0 (default 0.5 kg/m^2/yr).
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setBrineChemistry(double caMgL, double hcoMgL, double soMgL, double baMgL, double naMgL, double tdsMgL)
    Sets aqueous-phase chemistry used to evaluate the saturation index per segment.
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setInhibitorEfficiency(double efficiency)
    Sets the inhibitor efficiency applied uniformly along the pipeline (0..1).
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setpHAndCo2(double pH, double pco2Bar)
    Sets pH and CO2 partial pressure used by the scale calculator.
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setScaleDensity(double density)
    Sets the assumed scale density (default 2700 kg/m^3 for CaCO3).
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    setServiceYears(double years)
    Sets the service exposure time used to scale deposition mass and thickness.
    String

    Returns a JSON representation of the accumulator state.

    toMap()
    Returns a structured map representation suitable for JSON serialisation.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScaleDepositionAccumulator

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe)
      Constructs the accumulator bound to a Beggs-and-Brills pipeline.
      Parameters:
      pipe - the segmented pipeline (must already have been run)

  • Method Details

    • setBrineChemistry

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setBrineChemistry(double caMgL, double hcoMgL, double soMgL, double baMgL, double naMgL, double tdsMgL)
      Sets aqueous-phase chemistry used to evaluate the saturation index per segment.
      Parameters:
      caMgL - calcium concentration [mg/L]
      hcoMgL - bicarbonate concentration [mg/L]
      soMgL - sulphate concentration [mg/L]
      baMgL - barium concentration [mg/L]
      naMgL - sodium concentration [mg/L]
      tdsMgL - total dissolved solids [mg/L]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setpHAndCo2

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setpHAndCo2(double pH, double pco2Bar)
      Sets pH and CO2 partial pressure used by the scale calculator.
      Parameters:
      pH - pH of the aqueous phase
      pco2Bar - CO2 partial pressure [bar]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setInhibitorEfficiency

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setInhibitorEfficiency(double efficiency)
      Sets the inhibitor efficiency applied uniformly along the pipeline (0..1).
      Parameters:
      efficiency - fractional efficiency reducing deposition rate
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setServiceYears

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setServiceYears(double years)
      Sets the service exposure time used to scale deposition mass and thickness.
      Parameters:
      years - service time in years
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setScaleDensity

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setScaleDensity(double density)
      Sets the assumed scale density (default 2700 kg/m^3 for CaCO3).
      Parameters:
      density - kg/m^3
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setBaseRate

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator setBaseRate(double rate)
      Sets the base deposition rate at SI = 1.0 (default 0.5 kg/m^2/yr).
      Parameters:
      rate - kg/(m^2.yr)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • evaluate

      public ScaleDepositionAccumulator evaluate()
      Walks each Beggs-and-Brills segment, evaluates the CaCO3 saturation index, and integrates deposit mass and wall thickness. Sets timeToBlockage as the years until the maximum-thickness segment occludes 50% of the pipe cross-section.
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • getSegmentSaturationIndex

      public List<Double> getSegmentSaturationIndex()
      Returns the per-segment CaCO3 saturation index list.
      Returns:
      list of SI values, one per pipe segment

    • getSegmentDepositionMassKg

      public List<Double> getSegmentDepositionMassKg()
      Returns the per-segment cumulative deposition mass [kg].
      Returns:
      list of mass values

    • getSegmentThicknessMm

      public List<Double> getSegmentThicknessMm()
      Returns the per-segment scale thickness [mm].
      Returns:
      list of thicknesses

    • getTotalDepositionMassKg

      public double getTotalDepositionMassKg()
      Returns the integrated total deposition mass over all segments [kg].
      Returns:
      total mass

    • getMaxThicknessMm

      public double getMaxThicknessMm()
      Returns the maximum segment thickness [mm].
      Returns:
      max thickness

    • getTimeToBlockageYears

      public double getTimeToBlockageYears()
      Returns the projected time until the worst segment occludes half the pipe cross-section [years]. Positive infinity when no deposition is expected.
      Returns:
      years to 50% occlusion

    • isEvaluated

      public boolean isEvaluated()
      Returns true once evaluate() has been invoked.
      Returns:
      true if evaluated

    • getStandardsApplied

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getStandardsApplied()
      Returns the standards used by this accumulator.
      Returns:
      list of standard reference maps

      Returns a structured map representation suitable for JSON serialisation.
      Returns:
      ordered map

      public String toJson()
      Returns a JSON representation of the accumulator state.
